case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION vs. GOULD, ADRIENNE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GOULD, ADRIENNE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GOULD, ADRIENNE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT GOULD, ADRIENNE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GOULD, ADRIENNE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GOULD, ADRIENNE

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON FEB-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOULD, ADRIENNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY STREET, #620, SAN FRANCISCO $2,269.34 RENT, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,789.34, LEASE FORFEITED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT GOULD, ADRIENNE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

CASE CALLED TO TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT, ADRIENNE GOULD. RITA HALL, PROPERTY MANAGER OF 217 EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO IS SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBIT 1, RENTAL AGREEMENT, DATED 7-6-93 MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. EXHIBIT TWO, THREE DAY NOTICE,TO PAY RENT OR QUIT, DATED 10-11-93 IS MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE EXHIBIT THREE, PROOF OF SERVICE DATED 10-11-93 MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF, TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 217 EDDY, #620, SAN FRANCISCO PLUS $2,269.34 RENT AND DAMAGES. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS PER COST BILL ARE ALSO AWARDED. THE LEASE IS FORFEITED. EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
